name: Rectangle
description: Window manager — move and resize windows with keyboard shortcuts and snap areas

extraction.notes: Uses Sparkle 2 with GitHub-hosted appcast.xml. The appcast is generated from GitHub Releases. Also available via GitHub Releases API at https://api.github.com/repos/rxhanson/Rectangle/releases/latest.

changelog.notes: GitHub Release body contains markdown changelog.

notes: Open source (MIT). Free. Also available on Mac App Store. Uses Sparkle 2 for auto-updates with appcast hosted on GitHub. Download filename pattern: 'Rectangle{version}.dmg' (no version separator in filename). GitHub Releases and appcast are the primary sources of truth.
